rendered_alloy:
--[COMBINED CONSTRAINT: Linear Branch AND Alternative Futures]
--I want to see a linear story. AND I want to see different outcomes for a same situation.
pred linear_branch_alternative_futures_1778967754788 {
    (one w: World | no next.w) and (one w: World | no w.next) and (all w: World | lone w.next)

    one w: World | no next.w and #w.next >= 2 and (all w2: World | w != w2 implies w2 in w.next)
}

run linear_branch_alternative_futures_1778967754788 for 20 but 3 World, 7 Int
rendered_nl: I want to see a linear story. AND I want to see different outcomes for a same situation.

rendered_alloy:
--[COMBINED CONSTRAINT: Linear Branch AND Counterfactual Worlds]
--I want to see a linear story. AND I want to see that things may have taken a different outcome in the past.
pred linear_branch_counterfactual_worlds_1778967758930 {
    (one w: World | no next.w) and (one w: World | no w.next) and (all w: World | lone w.next)

    some w1, w2: World | w1 != w2 and next.w1 = next.w2 and (some w1.next or some w2.next)
}

run linear_branch_counterfactual_worlds_1778967758930 for 20 but 4 World, 7 Int
rendered_nl: I want to see a linear story. AND I want to see that things may have taken a different outcome in the past.

rendered_alloy:
--[COMBINED CONSTRAINT: Alternative Futures AND Counterfactual Worlds]
--I want to see different outcomes for a same situation. AND I want to see that things may have taken a different outcome in the past.
pred alternative_futures_counterfactual_worlds_1778967764262 {
    one w: World | no next.w and #w.next >= 2 and (all w2: World | w != w2 implies w2 in w.next)

    some w1, w2: World | w1 != w2 and next.w1 = next.w2 and (some w1.next or some w2.next)
}

run alternative_futures_counterfactual_worlds_1778967764262 for 20 but 4 World, 7 Int
rendered_nl: I want to see different outcomes for a same situation. AND I want to see that things may have taken a different outcome in the past.
